notes: Runs all backend unit and integration tests available in the repo.
Rejects duplicate, invalid, non-contiguous, or checksum-duplicated Postgres migration files.

gates.command: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
notes: CI uses npm cache and frontend/package-lock.json.
Verifies the logging guard scanner and any present log directories.
Tracks hit@k, recall@k, MRR, NDCG, coverage, source diversity, and unsupported-claim rate for rule-based fixtures.
Tracks expected node, edge, and normalized-code recall for rule-based Graph-NER fixtures.
Covers workflow creation, retrieval search, assistant stream, upload parse, reindex, and readiness.

gates.command: docker build --build-arg OJT_PYTHON_EXTRAS=parsing -t ojtflow-api:ci . && docker build -t ojtflow-frontend:ci ./frontend
notes: CI runs Docker build after backend and frontend pass.
Does not assert clean working tree; user-owned untracked files may exist.

gates.command: docker compose up -d --build && cd frontend && npm run e2e:smoke
gates.evidence: bounded Playwright smoke spec exit code 0
notes: CI runs a narrow login/authenticated-shell smoke through the Docker stack.

gates.evidence: Playwright suite exit code 0 and cleanup assertion passes
notes: Recommended before release candidate; can be skipped in constrained local checks with explicit env flag.

gates.evidence: public URL, health, readiness, auth, retrieval, and frontend checks printed
notes: Requires deployed URLs or local running services.

warnings: Release gates are a minimum bar; customer pilots may require additional security, privacy, and compliance review.
Manual gates must capture evidence in the release checklist before tagging a release candidate.
